title: End-to-end encryption for Vercel Workflow
raw_changelog: Vercel Workflow now encrypts all user data end-to-end. No code changes required.
before_text:
## Workflow Data Handling

Workflow inputs, step arguments, and return values are stored in the event log as plaintext.

**Security Note:** Do not pass sensitive data (API keys, tokens) through Workflow steps.
after_text:
## Workflow Data Handling

Workflow inputs, step arguments, return values, hook payloads, and stream data are automatically encrypted end-to-end before being written to the event log.

Each deployment receives a unique encryption key. The event log only stores ciphertext.

**It is now safe to pass sensitive data through Workflow steps.** No code changes required.
diff_text:
--- before
+++ after
@@ -1,5 +1,7 @@
 ## Workflow Data Handling
 
-Workflow inputs, step arguments, and return values are stored in the event log as plaintext.
+Workflow inputs, step arguments, return values, hook payloads, and stream data are automatically encrypted end-to-end.
 
-**Security Note:** Do not pass sensitive data (API keys, tokens) through Workflow steps.
+Each deployment receives a unique encryption key. The event log only stores ciphertext.
+
+**It is now safe to pass sensitive data through Workflow steps.** No code changes required.

ground_truth.action_required: No action required. Data is now automatically encrypted. Previously restricted sensitive data can now be passed through Workflow.
